statement: User #1 = AI-agent developers via elara-mcp (MCP server exposing sign-action/fetch-provenance tools). Smallest integration in the ecosystem; use case proven by the project itself (agent_audit records live on-mesh); AI-Act Article 12 + agent-liability insurance are the unpaid forcing functions. Flip-day headline: provable agent work log in 5 minutes, verifier verdict as the money shot. Factory/government come later through realms.
